blocks.text: An acquisition is agreed in a matter of weeks and absorbed over the many months that follow, and it is those months that decide whether the deal was worth making. Pinebrook Advisory Group LLC will stand with {{fact:f:E-2021-001.client}} through that second stretch. Before you sign, I want the whole of the engagement in front of you on a single page: what we will do, who will do it, what it costs, and when we begin.

Integration support means helping you make the hundreds of small decisions that turn two firms into one, and making them in the order that keeps the business running while they are made. We will set the two sides side by side, where they overlap and where they only differ, across reporting, systems, and the way each one books and bills its work, and hold every proposed change against one plain question: does it serve the combined business, or only tidy the org chart. What you will get is not a binder. It is a sequenced plan, a short list of the decisions that need your own hand, and a running way to see whether the savings the deal promised are actually arriving.

Jennifer Fletcher, our Senior Consultant, will lead the engagement and be the person you call. Integration is where she does her best work, because it rewards sequence and follow-through and she keeps both. Robert Miller, our Principal Consultant, will work the operating side alongside her, and Cynthia Ball, our Analyst, will keep the reconciliations and the savings tracker honest from one week to the next. Nothing reaches you under our name until I have read it end to end; I have always been the last set of eyes at this firm, and I mean to stay that way.

The fee is a fixed {{fact:f:E-2021-001.fee}} for the engagement as set out above, from the first day through the handover. We do not bill by the hour, so there is no clock for your people to watch and nothing to reconcile at the close. We begin on {{fact:f:E-2021-001.start}}, and an integration of this size usually runs about seven months; we have planned around that, and if what we find on the ground changes it, you will hear so from me early rather than late.

If that matches your understanding, sign below and return one copy to me and we will begin. If it does not, I would far sooner hear it now. Either way you have my word that this firm will treat the handover as carefully as you are treating it, and that I will be reading behind every step of the work.
